scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/parser && npm run build --workspace packages/formatter && npm run build --workspace packages/vscode && npm run build --workspace packages/language-server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace packages/parser && npm run test --workspace packages/formatter && npm run test --workspace packages/vscode && npm run build --workspace packages/parser && npm run build --workspace packages/formatter && npm run build --workspace packages/vscode && vitest run tests/integration
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test
